profile.name: Gabriel Riven Wahnich
profile.summary: Computer Science graduate (with Distinction) specialising in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, seeking a junior full-stack or AI engineering role. Practical experience building full-stack applications and agentic AI systems using modern LLM tooling. Strong foundation in Python, TypeScript, and backend development. Fluent in English and Spanish.

experience.title: Freelance Software Engineer
experience.description: Melbourne-based commission artist platform offering handmade pet portraits shipped worldwide.
responsibilities: Designed and built a full-stack platform managing ~500 artwork assets, testimonials, and customer enquiries
Developed a secure admin panel using JWT authentication and Argon2 password hashing
Designed and implemented a REST API with NestJS and PostgreSQL (Neon)
Offloaded image storage, optimisation, and delivery to Cloudinary using URL-based transformations
Built a responsive frontend using React (Vite), Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, and Framer Motion
Implemented email handling via Resend to manage and route customer enquiries
Preparing application for production deployment including environment configuration and client handoff

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
experience.description: Early-stage startup building a marketplace platform for musician collaboration.
responsibilities: Designed and shipped an Order History feature end-to-end across web (Next.js) and mobile (Expo)
Built and maintained microservices supporting order data flow
Integrated secure file-download functionality into the Order History interface for cross-artist file sharing
Collaborated via GitHub with branching, pull requests, and code review

experience.title: Systems Assembler and Hardware Technician
experience.description: Fast-paced retail and enterprise environment handling high volumes of custom system builds and hardware support.
responsibilities: Diagnosed and resolved hardware faults across consumer and enterprise systems
Assembled custom PC builds to specification and performed component-level quality testing
Applied BIOS and firmware updates to maintain hardware compatibility and system stability

education.degree: Bachelor of Computer Science with Distinction

interests: Game Development — building small-scale interactive projects with Unity and Godot
Football (Soccer) — follower of local A-League and international leagues
